title: Sopa de Macaco
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cfbe3edba91f37cba66dbeb25203097d0baa5d.png)
# What is this modpack?
Sopa de Macaco is a modpack designed for those who want to live an epic adventure with friends in a medieval fantasy world. Explore mysterious lands filled with hostile creatures, battle through hordes of ever-stronger monsters, and test your courage against new legendary bosses eager to challenge your skills.

# Why you should play this modpack?
This is more than just survival: the modpack delivers a complete experience that combines exploration, intense combat, and teamwork. Forge powerful weapons and armor, improve your abilities, and build settlements in a setting that feels like it was pulled straight from an epic tale.
Whether you want to embark on dangerous quests, conquer dungeons brimming with secrets, or simply enjoy an immersive world with friends, Sopa de Macaco turns every play session into a unique and unforgettable adventure.

**_If you wanna use this modpack, ask for permission and always give us credits: (Discord: Androsiolll, Davidde35)_**
